EmailTemplate.description: Recap email sent to Queue after completion of work together process
EmailTemplate.name: Work Together Process - Awaiting
EmailTemplate.subject: {!Case.Status} {!Case.RecordType}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear All,
A new {!Case.RecordType} has been {!Case.Status} by {!Case.CreatedBy} on {!Case.CreatedDate} and is awaiting client's feedback.
The request is about : "{!Case.Subject}" for the Company : "{!Account.Name}"
WTP Type : {!Case.Type} WTP Due Date : {!Case.Due_date__c}
To access the full information, please click on this link : https://carmignac-crm.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Case/{!Case.Id}/view
Kind regards,
